bookSourceComment: 勿下载，修改源变量值切换评论页数
bookSourceName: 起点读书(限免+本章说点购买)
loginUrl:
<js>
function login(){
    var cdkey = String(source.getLoginInfoMap().get("cdkey"));
    if(!cdkey){
        return;
    }
    source.put("cdkey", cdkey);
}
login();
</js>

ruleSearch.author: $.authorName
ruleSearch.bookUrl:
<js>
var cdkey = source.getLoginInfoMap().get("cdkey");
var params={{$.bookId}};
java.put("myBookId", params);
'http://101.200.42.234:15380/getCatalog?bookId='+params+'&token='+cdkey;
</js>
ruleSearch.name: $.bookName

ruleToc.chapterUrl:
<js>
var arr = baseUrl.match(/bookId=(\d+)/);
var bid = arr ? arr[1] : '';
source.put("bid", bid);
var cdkey = source.getLoginInfoMap().get("cdkey");
'http://101.200.42.234:15380/getchapter?bookId='+bid+'&chapterId={{$.chapterId}}&token='+cdkey;
</js>
